name: Unauthorized Access Witnessed
description: Internal form for employees who witnessed someone using credentials or accessing systems they shouldn't — shoulder-surfing, an unlocked logged-in workstation, badge sharing, an unfamiliar person in a restricted area.
title: Report Unauthorized Access You Witnessed
intro:
Thanks for paying attention. If you saw someone signed in to a coworker's account, found a laptop unlocked and abandoned, watched a person tailgate through a badged door, or noticed someone in a place they shouldn't be — tell us.

You don't need proof of bad intent. We'd rather hear a false alarm than miss a real one, and we will handle this discreetly. Takes about 4 minutes.
submit_message: Thanks for reporting this. Security will follow up shortly. We'll keep your name out of any conversation with the person involved unless you tell us otherwise.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: We'll only contact you about this report. Your identity stays with Security.

fields.label: What did you see?
fields.help: Pick the closest match. You can add more detail below.
options: Someone signed in to another person's account
Badge sharing or tailgating into a restricted area
Unfamiliar person in a restricted area
Someone shoulder-surfing or photographing a screen
Credential or password being shared verbally / in chat
fields.sample_value: Someone signed in to another person's account

fields.label: Where did this happen?
fields.help: Office, floor, room, system, or app — wherever you saw it.
fields.placeholder: e.g. 4th floor finance pod, near the printer
fields.sample_value: 4th floor finance pod, the open desk near the printer

fields.label: Who was involved?
fields.help: Names if you know them. Otherwise a description (clothing, build, badge color, anything you remember). It's okay to be vague.
fields.sample_value: Looked like a contractor — visitor badge, mid-30s, dark hoodie. Was on Jamie Cole's workstation. Jamie is on PTO this week.

fields.label: Which account, system, or area was accessed?
fields.help: If you know whose login they were on, or what app was open, tell us.
fields.sample_value: Jamie Cole's Windows session, Salesforce was open

fields.label: How serious does this feel to you?
fields.help: Your gut is useful. We'll take it into account.

fields.label: Did you do anything in the moment?
options: Asked them what they were doing

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.help: Optional. Witnesses, camera coverage in the area, follow-up plans.
fields.sample_value: There's a ceiling camera right above that pod. My teammate Dev saw it too.

alert_template.title: Unauthorized access witnessed by {{reporter_email}}: {{what_you_saw}}
